item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-p10","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The answer immediately refuses to add another warranty field, explicitly recognizes the repeated pattern across seal, tax rate, delivery date, and warranty requests, and moves upstream to a unified commercial-terms collection, validation, traceability, and responsibility boundary.
